race.comment: FINDING ELLE (8) missed the placings two runs back then got a long way back last start when 4 lengths away in sixth over 1400m at Coffs Harbour. Finds a more suitable contest and can find winning form. IT'S OK (9) was 16 lengths from the winner in 11th over 1614m at Taree last time following a minor placing on debut the run before. Has the addition of blinkers. Worth another chance. MISS DYLAN IVY (10) finished 5.5 lengths away in sixth last time out over 1305m at this track three weeks ago. Tackles a longer journey this time. Backmarker who gets home hard. Will be picking them up late. MS HUBBLE (11) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 0.8 lengths from the winner in second over 1400m at Coffs Harbour. Looks to be in the right race so another bold effort is on the cards.
